books.title: Tracking Trash
books.author: Loree Griffin Burns
books.rationale: Students follow a scientist who uses creative methods to better understand ocean currents and our impact on life within the sea.

books.title: The Wolves and Moose of Isle Royale: Restoring an Island Ecosystem
books.author: Nancy F. Castaldo
books.rationale: Students discover the threatened predator-prey relationship that maintains the Isle Royale ecosystem in this fascinating story. Will scientists be able to restore the balance?  Let's follow this living laboratory experiment.

books.title: The Frog Scientist
books.author: Pamela Turner
books.rationale: Scientists now know that frogs are particularly sensitive to pollution. Readers join the work of scientists who are learning just how chemical run-off affects their life cycle. This text is a particularly good example of the relationship between field and laboratory work and introduces important facets of excellent experimental design "by-the-way."
